name: seg_depth_tradeoff_q7
description: CH segment-size <-> circuit-depth tradeoff at q7 shock (A=0.4, nu=0.03). Two relL2-vs-segment curves: NOISELESS (only seam error -> monotonically falling as segments lengthen) and NOISY sim (seam error + depth decoherence -> U-shaped, an optimum segment-size). Depth-per-circuit (rising with segment-size) is overlaid to explain the noisy curve's upturn. Noisy paths are filled after running burgers_ch_segdepth_noisy_q7.toml (T1=150,T2=100 thermal sim).
_todo: After running burgers_ch_segdepth_noisy_q7.toml, set each point's noisy_path (and the seg=2 noiseless_path if that run is added).
